Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.
